creator: drosotic@gmx.com
text:
Hello,

Problem still existing.

$ freebsd-version -kru
14.1-RELEASE-p3
14.1-RELEASE-p3
14.1-RELEASE-p3

$ lowriter --version
LibreOffice 24.2.4.2 420(Build:2)

$ python --version
Python 3.11.9

$ unoconv --version
unoconv 0.7
Written by Dag Wieers <dag@wieers.com>
Homepage at http://dag.wieers.com/home-made/unoconv/

platform posix/freebsd14
python 3.11.9 (main, Jul  6 2024, 01:06:23) [Clang 16.0.6 (https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project.git llvmorg-16.0.6-0-g7cbf1a
LibreOffice 24.2.4.2


I can't install those extensions :
    https://extensions.libreoffice.org/en/extensions/show/dictionnaires-francais
    https://extensions.libreoffice.org/en/extensions/show/grammalecte


Error message :

(com.sun.star.lang.DisposedException) { { { Message = "Binary URP bridge disposed during call at /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-24.2.4.2/binaryurp/source/bridge.cxx:613", Context = (com.sun.star.uno.XInterface) @39ad5c07a300 } } }

Any clue ?
Darius
